conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical conditions determined for linear PLAs
conditions.detector: UV-detector G 1314A, evaporative light scattering detector ELS 1000
conditions.evidence_text: The critical conditions for linear PLAs with molar masses ranging from 4800 to 26000 g/mol were determined at 50 8C at a composition of 57.1/42.9 (1,4-dioxane/n-hexane). Despite the different molar masses, all samples elute at the same elution volume (Fig. 1).
conditions.corresponding_author_name: Wolfgang Radke; Karsten Rode; Alexander V. Gorshkov; Tadeusz Biela
conditions.physical_address: Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), Schlossgartenstr. 6, 64289 Darmstadt, Germany; N.N. Semenov Institute of Chemical Physics, Russian Academy of Sciences, Kosygina 4, 119991 Moscow, Russian Federation; Department of Polymer Chemistry, Center of Molecular and Macromolecular Studies, Polish Academy of Sciences, Sienkiewicza 112, PL-90-363 Lodz, Poland
